channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Diverging trends: Ether slides below $2,000 while futures open interest hits record high of 16 million ETH
item.description: Ether drops below $2,000 amid heavy selling pressure, yet futures open interest hits a record high. This divergences suggests aggressive shorting.

item.title: Crypto companies have tightened compliance, but gaps remain: Chainalysis
item.description: Around 47% of crypto organizations onboarded in 2026 are operating at alerting standards that would have ranked among the industry’s strictest five years ago.

item.title: Crypto markets shed $80B after fresh US strikes on Iran
item.description: The crypto market capitalization has fallen to its lowest level since mid-April after the US carried out strikes on Iran for the second time in three days amid peace talks.

item.title: CFTC seeks to reverse settlement deal with Gemini
item.description: The CFTC claimed that its settled complaint filed under the Biden administration relied heavily on a whistleblower’s allegations that Gemini inflated trading activity to distort user demand.

item.title: BlackRock's bitcoin ETF sheds $528 million, the second-largest daily outflow on record
item.description: IBIT recorded its second-biggest single-day net outflow since launch on Wednesday, missing a January record by less than half a million dollars, as the Iran-driven sell-off pulled institutional money out of bitcoin.

item.title: Bitcoin funding spike shows longs defending $70K: Will ETF outflows reverse bulls’ efforts?
item.description: Bitcoin dropped closer to a critical support level as spot and long futures traders’ efforts to hold $75,000 failed. Is sub-$70,000 BTC next?

item.title: Bitcoin could be heading much lower, fund manager warns as $150 billion Treasury operation nears
item.description: Fund manager Michael Kramer says a $150 billion liquidity drain from upcoming U.S. Treasury operations could push bitcoin sharply lower.

item.title: XRP drops 4% below $1.30 as heavy selling breaks key support zone
item.description: XRP lost another major support level after high-volume selling accelerated late in the session, keeping focus on whether the months-long compression structure is now breaking lower.

item.title: Bitcoin drops below $73,000 as U.S. strikes on Iran spark $1 billion liquidations
item.description: Crypto majors sold off 3% to 4% and nearly $1 billion in leveraged positions were wiped out after U.S. airstrikes on an Iranian military site near the Strait of Hormuz reignited the conflict markets had started to price out.

item.title: US charges Google employee with insider trading bets on Polymarket
item.description: The Justice Department and the CFTC allege that Google software engineer Michele Spagnuolo profited $1.2 million on Polymarket after accessing non-public information at work.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 Bitcoin falls under $73,000 after US and Iran launch attacks against each other. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1OVU4yUHQ5TGZtOG5HRktLV1ZoY2JNTWxfdDhGeEFVall6SV8zcXpSOTN5Zm5SeEZxMGdGRjJwSGx5Um4xQXlyU2pQZ2lNczNfMnJ5MFVhR0EwdmRsdGk4ZjNB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 Bitcoin falls un…

item.title: BREAKING: Bitcoin falls below $74,000 as $230 million worth of levered longs are liquidated in 60 minutes. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE02UE1XdFFXQnhyUElId3R5bkw1anFXWnJKclFRcjZNSURsWlNrY05kc3NzSTFBWnF3V2prdkNzZmtKeS1PRGNsTmltSkhENXhqdEIzRW80Y1JCOUh4UFpjWGV6S2p5dw?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Bitcoin falls belo…

item.title: Kraken rolls out Bitcoin vault product for holders to earn yield
item.description: Within the first 10 hours of launch, the Kraken Earn BTC Vault raked in $30 million worth of Bitcoin deposits from 4,000 unique wallets.

item.title: Bitcoin falls further as BTC miners pivot to AI, pro-crypto legislation stalls
item.description: Bitcoin’s underperformance of stocks deepened as BTC miners pivoted to AI and pro-crypto regulation in the United States stalled.

item.title: U.S. CFTC files request to erase Gemini settlement that it no longer considers fair
item.description: The regulator went back to analyze the 2022 case and decided that it wouldn't have been pursued under current management and practices.

item.title: Crypto card monthly transaction volume surges 230% from 2025
item.description: Payment volume on crypto-linked credit and debit cards has been steadily increasing since 2024, reaching about $7.8 billion in cumulative transactions this month.

item.title: Bitcoin miner inflows to Binance soar as BTC struggles to hold uptrend: Is $70K next?
item.description: Weakening spot demand, miner inflows to exchanges and freshly opened shorts put downside pressure on Bitcoin price.

item.title: Google engineer insider-traded search results on Polymarket, Feds allege
item.description: The charges mark the second major arrest over insider trading on a prediction market.

item.title: Polymarket weighs KYC requirements amid global crackdown on prediction markets
item.description: The predictions market operator reportedly explored mandatory user verification requirements, breaking from its policies of allowing traders to access its services using pseudonyms.

item.title: The crypto industry’s massive political war chest is starting to lean Republican ahead of midterms
item.description: As crypto world notches political wins in Texas and beyond, some of its emerging political action committees ditch bipartisan approach for a Republican focus.

item.title: AI Chatbots Could Quietly Pull Users Away From Reality, Researchers Warn
item.description: Researchers warn that prolonged chatbot interactions could distort how some users experience reality and social connection.

item.title: Here's How Much Bitcoin Elon Musk Would Control If SpaceX and Tesla Merge
item.description: If Tesla and SpaceX merged—as is a reported possibility—then Elon Musk's combined entity would hold billions of dollars' worth of Bitcoin.

item.title: Ethereum Traders Grow Increasingly Bearish as ETFs Bleed, ETH Sinks Near $2,000
item.description: Predictors on Myriad are losing faith, believing it's more likely that Ethereum dumps to $1,500 before a prospective move up to $3,000.

item.title: Updates since then: * Deepseek v4 is out. There *is* a 2-bit quant that can run within 90 GB ( huggingface.co/antirez/deepse… ), and it works, however it's only fast on Apple hardware (I've head ~35 tok/s). On AMD, it's ~7 tok/s. IMO actually taking the effort to p - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFBFQ1BQWHdkRzJraG9yaEYzbHhwUmdpX2NCV2xPaERQU0o4Vi1HSkI4dmdjTHV3QmVHbU8wc01BZFNrWnNudTAwaVZ6TTQwUWZXT1UzcUpWdGozZE82RGRzd29WTFg5dw?oc=5" target="_blank">Updates since then: * Deepse…

item.title: Orca, Streamex roll out secondary trading infrastructure for tokenized securities
item.description: Accredited investors can buy and sell the gold-backed GLDY token through permissioned liquidity pools operating on the Solana blockchain.

item.title: ElevenLabs, Stability AI Drop New AI Music Models—Can They Catch Suno?
item.description: Music v2 brings genre-shifting and section-by-section composition to ElevenLabs. Stable Audio 3.0 ships open weights and six-minute tracks. Is either good enough to dethrone the category leader?

item.title: PACs laud Texas primary wins, look to back more pro-crypto candidates
item.description: While crypto-backed candidates won runoffs in Texas on Tuesday, industry PACs have less of a stake in California races next week.

item.title: Marvel Comics Icon Stan Lee Has Been 'Revived' With AI Tech—Again
item.description: ElevenLabs has licensed Stan Lee’s voice and likeness, adding the late Marvel comic creator to a growing market for AI celebrity replicas.

item.title: Bitcoin treasury company Nakamoto falls nearly 67% YTD after reverse stock split
item.description: The company owns 5,058 Bitcoin, ranking it as the 20th largest publicly traded BTC treasury company, according to data from Bitcoin Treasuries.

item.title: DeepSeek, Xiaomi Just Made Frontier AI 99% Cheaper. American Labs Went the Other Way
item.description: Back-to-back price cuts from China's top AI labs have made their models a fraction of the cost of GPT-5.5 and Claude Opus.

item.title: TLDRStop valuing Ethereum on its fees. Fees are friction, and the one number a winning network drives toward zero. ETH fees have fallen from more than $50 per transaction at the 2021 peak to about $0.20 today, while the network now processes more than - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE5aZ3dGRzVES2h2cFR4SmNWcHdoU1RsaU0yRnJYNThHTmxBZlk5WGR0Y1piS1REOXNYUkU3dkp1SkhYcGlKbzFqSkJhZktlVktPU240RWcxVjdmWk0zWVpiSQ?oc=5" target="_blank">TLDRStop valuing Ethereum on its fee…

item.title: Ether bears at risk of $2B squeeze as short positions build around $2K
item.description: Ether futures positioning tightened near $2,000 as rising open interest and dense short liquidity increased focus on a possible squeeze above $2,150.

item.title: Wall Street gets new crypto rival after Texas bank completes regulatory pivot
item.description: By establishing a national charter under the executive branch, United Texas Bank said it intends to enable AI-driven payment rails to intercept global digital dollar volumes.

item.title: Cash App Now Supports Stablecoins, Despite Bitcoin Maxi Jack Dorsey's 'Gatekeeper' Gripes
item.description: Cash App has begun supporting stablecoin transactions on networks including Ethereum and Solana, pushing past its Bitcoin-based roots.

item.title: Price predictions 5/27: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ZEC, ADA, XMR
item.description: Bitcoin briefly lost the $75,000 level after net flows into spot BTC ETFs turned negative. Do technical charts point to a BTC and altcoin recovery?

item.title: Mastercard secures New York BitLicense for crypto operations
item.description: The payments giant can now legally conduct digital asset business activity in New York as it deepens its focus on blockchain-based settlement systems.

item.title: Elon Musk could become a top 5 corporate bitcoin holder if Tesla and SpaceX merge
item.description: CNBC reported Tuesday that Musk is discussing a merger between Tesla and SpaceX that would tie his tech empire closer together and instantly create the world’s fifth-largest corporate bitcoin treasury, worth $3.3 billion.

item.title: OpenAI Foundation Pledges $250 Million to Help Cushion AI's Economic Disruption
item.description: The philanthropic arm of ChatGPT maker OpenAI will fund research, worker support, and new models for sharing the gains from automation.

item.title: YouTube Makes AI Content Labels More Prominent as Google Pushes Video Remix Tools
item.description: YouTube says new disclosure tools and automatic AI detection will help viewers more easily identify AI-generated videos.

item.title: BREAKING: Cumulative crypto card payment volumes have reached a record $7.8 billion, with monthly volumes now up +230% since May 2025. Crypto card adoption has rapidly accelerated in 2026 due to growing access to stablecoins as a payment rail thro - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE1Ua3RtaDlqQmZsVjlJX3NFX0RWcFJqb0dGTzhWZFVpNElxd0gtU29GaTRSejRKV0NrbWF5SUpndlROMVp0am40SU5ZZDR5cGVGamVZMUFwWXZDb2l6OU1mVlY5WU9IZw?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Cumulative crypto …

item.title: SoFi Launches SoFiUSD Stablecoin Across Ethereum and Solana
item.description: SoFi is making its SoFiUSD token available to members, marking a milestone in the convergence of regulated banking and blockchain.

item.title: Prediction markets enter the derivatives era: XBIT DEX opens whitelist for prediction leverage, launching a 35,000 USDC campaign
item.description: XBIT DEX takes the lead in introducing leverage to on-chain prediction markets, prioritizing the 2026 FIFA World Cup for its initial category. The whitelist application is now live.

item.title: Bitcoin price threatens $75K loss as US-Iran peace progress sparks new stocks records
item.description: Bitcoin disappointed bulls by dropping below $75,000 on Iran peace deal reports while US stocks hit new all-time highs and oil saw one-month lows on Hormuz hopes.

item.title: BTC Prague 2026: Europe’s leading Bitcoin conference expands its cultural reach
item.description: BTC Prague, Europe’s premier Bitcoin conference, returns to the PVA Expo Prague on June 11-13, 2026.

item.title: Crypto Long & Short: How the GENIUS Act repriced bitcoin's monetary premium
item.description: In this week's Crypto Long & Short, Ravi Tanuku on why the GENIUS Act didn't just regulate stablecoins, it repriced Bitcoin's monetary premium. Then, Jesper Johansen on why looped ETH staking no longer needs a lending market.

item.title: BIS project finds tokenization could make cross-border payments faster, safer
item.description: Project Agorá, backed by major central banks, will now move toward "real-value" testing to settle tokenized central bank money and bank deposits on blockchain rails.

item.title: Kraken Now Lets You Earn Yield on Bitcoin Holdings via Lending Vaults
item.description: Kraken customers can make use of their Bitcoin holdings and generate BTC yield without ever leaving the exchange.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Crypto IPOs could create massive $1 trillion market amid tokenization wave, Jefferies says
item.description: The Wall Street investment bank expects a wave of crypto and blockchain public listings over the next two years as institutional investors shift their focus from speculative trading to real-world financial infrastructure.

item.title: Huawei's New Benchmark Gives AI Agents Months of Your Life—Then Watches Them Fail
item.description: Claw-Anything simulates a real digital existence and asks AI assistants to handle it. GPT-5.5, the best model available, scored 34.5%.

item.title: Mastercard Secures New York BitLicense in Push for Stablecoins, Tokenized Deposits
item.description: Mastercard has secured a highly coveted BitLicense in New York, anchoring its compliance-first strategy for stablecoins on Wall Street.

item.title: Block kicks off Cash App’s phased stablecoin roll out to its nearly 60 million users
item.description: An individual familiar with the matter told CoinDesk the stablecoin feature was rolled out to 25% of users already and by the end of the week, all users will have access.

item.title: A bipartisan bridge to the future: Why the Senate must finish the job on digital Assets
item.description: The Clarity Act’s recent markup proved that the momentum for regulation is there. It is imperative that Congress move the bill forward to establish rules this generation needs and a framework the next will inherit, urges Kim.

item.title: Robinhood is letting AI trade for you so you don't have to keep checking the markets
item.description: Robinhood is bringing hedge fund-style automation to everyday investors by letting AI agents build portfolios, execute stock trades, and even go shopping using virtual credit cards.

item.title: DTCC plans to bring tokenized assets to Stellar in latest Wall Street blockchain push
item.description: The U.S. market infrastructure giant targets connecting tokenized stocks, ETFs and Treasuries to Stellar in the first half of 2027.

item.title: Crypto’s biggest exchanges back push for token disclosure standards as industry courts institutional capital
item.description: More than 40 crypto firms, including rival exchanges Coinbase and Kraken, are backing a Blockworks-led framework aimed at bringing stock market-style disclosures to token markets.

item.title: Banca Sella gets green light to provide crypto services to customers in Italian first
item.description: The fintech-forward private bank said it is the first Italian lender to get Bank of Italy approval under MiCA to offer digital asset custody and transfers.

item.title: Robinhood Opens Platform to AI Agents for Stock Trading and Credit Card Spending
item.description: Retail brokerage Robinhood now lets users delegate stock purchases and credit card transactions to third-party AI systems.

item.title: Major crypto exchanges increase transfer scrutiny with HTX over UK sanctions
item.description: The UK sanctioned crypto exchange HTX due to alleged ties to Russian sanctions evasion networks and illicit financial activity.

item.title: Solana Meme Coin Surges 6,000% After Creators Arrested Over 'Rug Pull'
item.description: The charges against the CatFi creators mark the first time South Korean prosecutors have applied the new Virtual Asset User Protection Act.
